hints.title: Hint 2
hints.content: Did you click to the 2026 link on the announcement?

hints.title: Hint 3
hints.content: Well, that was actually a distraction. The problem is not about color blindness. Did you not read the problem name?

hints.title: Hint 4
hints.content: The image looks weird, why is that?

hints.title: Hint 5
hints.content: What could "double vision" refer to here?

solutions.title: Solution
solutions.content:
This problem is a follow up on the last year's "blurred vision". However, as the name suggests, you need to use both of your eyes to solve it.
Specifically, the image is a
autostereogram
made out of the
Ishihara Test
in the rick roll video of the announcement. If you look at the image using the proper technique or use one of the online Autostereogram solvers, you would find the text "YU5zV2VS" embedded in the image.
If you haven't already, please try to see it without any tools.
Extra Challenge
Can you figure out what YU5zV2VS stands for?
